asset_name: Branded Cerebrolysin Trial-Material and Current Programme Evidence
source_domain: ClinicalTrials.gov records describing manufacturer-controlled porcine-derived Cerebrolysin in stroke, subarachnoid haemorrhage and ongoing intracerebral-haemorrhage research
prohibited_use: Personal dosing, injection, infusion or reconstitution guidance
Authorised, branded or study-material evidence transfer to supplier products
Assumption of source, sequence, glycosylation, composition, potency or sterility
Fertility, muscle, immune, neurological or longevity protocols
